title: LCG's Resident Evil Addon
description: Adds some stuff from the Resident Evil game series.
body:
Thanks for downloading LCG's Resident Evil Addon! This mod adds lots of stuff (Hopefully everything at some point) from the Resident Evil game series.

As of now it adds:
2 Herbs
The Eggs from Resident Evil 4
Herb Mixtures
The Herb Pie Recipe from Outbreak
The First Aid Spray
Health Tablets
Herbs that generate in the world as plants

That's all it adds for now, but soon there will be more (If I remember to update this lol)
